subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified above all remembrance and attributes of the peoples of the world, befitteth and beseemeth the Lord of all nations and necks, Who by His will [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از اذکار و اوصاف احزاب عالم مالک رقاب امم را لایق و سزاست که باراده
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @service to others; to the Cause of God
